revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:MediaWiki:Protectedpagetext]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links
Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
/* top */add mw-parser-output wrapper in preparation for TemplateStyles in [[Module:Message box]]
revision.text: __NOTOC__{{#switch:{{CASCADINGSOURCES}} | {{FULLPAGENAME}}|= {{#ifexist: Template:Editnotices/Protection/{{FULLPAGENAME}} | {{Template:Editnotices/Protection/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|$1|$2}} | {{#ifeq: {{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|1|1}} | Special:Upload | {{Generic image names|protected}} | {{#switch: $1 | protect | editprotected = {{protected page text/full|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | templateeditor = {{protected page text/template|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | extendedconfirmed = {{protected page text/extendedconfirmed|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | #default = {{protected page text/semi|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} }}{{#switch:$2|edit|create={{editnotice load|notice action = view}}}} }} |#default = }} }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
revision.text: __NOTOC__{{#switch:{{CASCADINGSOURCES}} | {{FULLPAGENAME}}|= {{#ifexist: Template:Editnotices/Protection/{{FULLPAGENAME}} | {{Template:Editnotices/Protection/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|$1|$2}} | {{#ifeq: {{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|1|1}} | Special:Upload | {{Generic image names|protected}} | {{#switch: $1 | protect | editprotected = {{protected page text/full|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | templateeditor = {{protected page text/template|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | extendedconfirmed = {{protected page text/extendedconfirmed|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | #default = {{protected page text/semi|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} }}{{#switch:$2|edit|create={{editnotice load|notice action = view}}}} }} |#default = }} }}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25397554627|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: __NOTOC__{{#switch:{{CASCADINGSOURCES}} | {{FULLPAGENAME}}|= {{#ifexist: Template:Editnotices/Protection/{{FULLPAGENAME}} | {{Template:Editnotices/Protection/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|$1|$2}} | {{#ifeq: {{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|1|1}} | Special:Upload | {{Generic image names|protected}} | {{#switch: $1 | protect | editprotected = {{protected page text/full|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | templateeditor = {{protected page text/template|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | extendedconfirmed = {{protected page text/extendedconfirmed|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} | #default = {{protected page text/semi|$1|$2|talk-protected={{#if:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|true|false}}}} }}{{#switch:$2|edit|create={{editnotice load|notice action = view}}}} }} |#default = }} }}
